extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates matters filed by and against each entity: I counted the five criminal proceedings against Directors, the nine tax proceedings against the Company, and zero statutory/regulatory proceedings; I excluded all “By” rows and counted no criminal, regulatory, or tax proceedings against Subsidiaries. For the aggregate amount against the Company and Subsidiaries, I included ₹35.85 million against the Company and USD 1.57 million against Subsidiaries, excluding promoter/director and “By” matters; using the stated ₹82.91/USD conversion, this is approximately ₹166.00 million, or ₹16.60 crore. The contingent-liabilities table is dated December 31, 2023 and has no stated Total row, so the disclosed ₹0.40 million bank guarantee plus ₹6.55 million income-tax matters were summed to ₹6.95 million, or ₹0.695 crore. Company-wide customer concentration is disclosed for the full Financial Year 2023 using revenue from operations: top five customers were 49.19% and top ten customers were 67.00%; the source tables use ₹ million and USD million, so the source currency unit is mixed, with ₹ million converted to crore at 10 million per crore and USD converted at ₹82.91/USD.
